meta.description: Auto Quests Bot — Professional Discord Quest Automation. Secure, parallel execution with zero token exposure.

profile.name: Auto Quest 2.0
profile.bio: Automatically complete Discord quests — watch, play, stream & activity. Runs multiple quests in parallel and updates progress in real-time through a single message.

hero.title: Auto Quests Bot
hero.subtitle: The ultimate solution for completing Discord quests seamlessly and earning Orbs. Experience real-time tracking, multi-threaded execution, and bank-grade security.

features.title: A comprehensive feature ecosystem
features.subtitle: Meticulously engineered for enterprise-grade speed, privacy, and reliability.
features.parallel_desc: Execute up to 6 quests simultaneously through completely isolated asynchronous threads.
features.security_desc: Military-grade AES-256-GCM encryption. Your token never touches a database in plaintext.
features.auto_desc: Smart Scheduler autonomously checks for new quests and DMs delivery reports every 48 hours.
features.live_desc: Live metrics provided directly to you via a single dynamic, real-time message stream.
features.hidden_desc: All integrations and outputs are completely ephemeral. Data is perpetually masked to observers.
features.stats_desc: Get deep analytic dashboards per stored profile — tracking performance quotas and usage.
features.multi_desc: Video Watching · Desktop Gaming · Streaming to Friends · Co-op Activities — 100% supported.
features.recovery_desc: Automatically resumes interrupted sessions. Ensures your workflow is never broken.
features.orbs_desc: Quickly complete all Discord Quests to easily rack up valuable Orbs reward points.
features.oss_desc: Full source code is public. Easy to audit, contribute, and comprehensive self-hosting docs.

guide.title: Start Using AutoQuest
guide.subtitle: It only takes 3 minutes to set up full automation for your Discord Quests.
guide.step1_desc: Add the bot to your server. We highly recommend joining our support server for the latest updates.
guide.step2_desc: Use our secure script to extract your token directly from the browser console.
guide.step2_warning: ⚠️ Warning: Never share this token with anyone else.
guide.step3_desc: Use the /autoquests add command in Discord to save your token and start questing 24/7.
guide.step3_note: Use /autoquests run to start your first session immediately.
guide.cmd_autoquests_run: — Run your first quest session now

security.title: Security Architecture
security.subtitle: We operate under zero-trust models. Everything we do is publicly verifiable.
security.commit2: Unique cryptographic key derived per unique Discord user profile
security.commit3: Strict no-log policy regarding connection tokens and session footprints
security.commit4: Source code available uncompiled and completely public on GitHub
security.commit5: Extensive Docker and native environment Self-Host guidelines provided
security.commit6: Control your data remotely: Delete footprints entirely with a single command
security.selfhost: Prefer isolated silos? Deploy to your own personal architecture entirely.

token.title: How to Get Your Token
token.subtitle: Securely extract your Discord token directly from the browser.
token.step0: Go to https://discord.com/channels/@me and log in to Discord in your browser.
token.step1: Open Developer Tools using F12 or Ctrl + Shift + I.
token.step2: Enable Mobile Device Emulation with Ctrl + Shift + M.
token.step3: Paste the following script into the Console tab and press Enter:
token.safe_desc: Never send this token to anyone. We encrypt it immediately upon system storage.
token.alternative: * Alternatively, open the Application tab > Local Storage and find the token key under discord.com (after enabling mobile emulation).

commands.title: Command Index
commands.subtitle: Optimized, robust, and designed for privacy.
commands.q_desc: Instantly process all available quests for the provided token (One-time).
commands.a_add: Save encrypted token and automatically perform quests for new events 24/7.
commands.a_list: Display a list of accounts currently in Automated status.
commands.a_rem: Unlink token and permanently wipe your statistical history from the database.
commands.a_run: Trigger an immediate manual execution cycle for a saved token sector.
commands.a_pause: Suspend automated scheduling cycles for the specified token label.
commands.a_resume: Re-activate automated scheduling and recalibrate the next run vector.
commands.a_status: Request a deep-scan of token status, last run logs, and next cycle timing.
commands.s_user: Detailed report on performance and quest volume you've completed.
commands.s_info: Broad-spectrum system diagnostic: version, uptime, and cluster health.

live_stats.title: Live System Telemetry
live_stats.subtitle: Uncached operational metrics, synchronized every 30 seconds.

faq.title: Knowledge Base (FAQ)
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about AutoQuest's operation and security.
faq.q1: Does the architecture store my secure Token?
faq.a1: Only if instructed by /autoquests. Under this operation, the Token is hashed and secured via AES-256-GCM utilizing your unique user key. Single-run interactions (/quests) execute entirely in system memory and leave zero persistence footprint.
faq.q2: Do I face account limitation risks using this?
faq.a2: Our software strictly simulates genuine Discord client throughput and conforms precisely to acceptable API endpoints. However, automated mechanics always carry an inherent structural risk within third-party environments. Operations are utilized at user discretion.
faq.q3: Which specific quest structures are supported?
faq.a3: Full 100% operational coverage for: Watch VOD (Desktop/Mobile), Interactive Desktop Play, Live Streaming Integrations, and In-client Activities.
faq.a4: Yes. The software is released under MIT with extensive Docker deployment scripts and architectural blueprints present.
faq.q5: What is the data retention and erasure policy?
faq.a5: Triggering the removal process via the slash command will cryptographically shred and permanently delete token data and sub-metric linkage from our root datastores.
faq.a6: This architecture is published entirely as a non-profit open-source standard. Absolutely zero hidden fees or tiered subscriptions apply.
faq.q7: How do I report technical anomalies?
faq.a7: Escalate directly via GitHub Issues for tracked repository updates or discuss structurally inside our Developer Discord Community.
faq.q8: How do I know the bot is working?
faq.a8: Upon quest completion, the bot sends an Ephemeral message (only visible to you) or a DM notification if in AutoQuest mode. You can also monitor your progress via /stats user.
faq.q9: Why do I need to enable Mobile mode to get the token?
faq.a9: Discord restricts access to the getToken() function on standard Web/Desktop clients as a security measure. Mobile emulation bypasses this restriction by simulating a different environment.
faq.q10: Does the bot require my PC to stay on?
faq.a10: No. If you use /autoquests add, our cloud architecture operates 24/7 without requiring your hardware to be active.
faq.q11: Can I use multiple accounts simultaneously?
faq.a11: Yes. You can add unlimited accounts by repeatedly using the /autoquests add command with different tokens.
faq.a12: The entire source code is hosted on GitHub under the MIT license. We welcome contributions regarding logic improvements, translations, or security audits.

oss.title: Open Source & Community
oss.subtitle: Transparency is the foundation of trust.
oss.architecture_desc: Built on Python & Disnake, utilizing SQLite for high-performance data management and Docker for stable deployment.
oss.contribute_desc: We use a standard Pull Request workflow. You can help improve quest-logic or the web interface.
oss.selfhost_desc: If you want 100% control, follow the simplified README guide to spin up your own server in under 5 minutes.

footer.tagline: Automate quests completely. Maintain absolute security.
footer.made_by: Developed by @htch9999 · Open Source · MIT License
footer.disclaimer: Not affiliated with Discord Inc. AutoQuest does not store your data.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.content:
Welcome to AutoQuest! We understand that security and privacy are paramount when using automation services. This policy transparently outlines how we protect you.

1. Core Information Collection

AutoQuest requires only one piece of information: your Discord Authentication Token. This is highly sensitive data, and our system is built with a Zero-Knowledge standard.

2. High-Level Encryption

As soon as you provide your Token via a Discord command, it is immediately hashed and encrypted at the highest level using the AES-256-GCM algorithm. The original Token is never saved directly to disk, log files, or any system reports in plain-text.

3. No-Log / No-Share Policy

AutoQuest strictly commits to never selling, renting, or trading your personal information or Token in any form to third parties, advertising companies, or analytics services.

4. Absolute Opt-out Right

As the data owner, you have the right to 100% erase your footprint with a single action. The command /autoquests remove will force the system to permanently delete all encrypted records, running automated threads, and any associated personal statistics from our servers immediately.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.content:
By using the AutoQuest platform, you agree to comply with all of the following principles. Please read carefully before forcing the system to record your token.

1. Disclaimer of Liability

AutoQuest is a software tool provided As Is. We are not responsible for any penalties from Discord Inc., including account bans/disabling due to individual automation abuse. Using the tool is 100% at the end user's own risk.

2. Commitment to Validity

You must be the legal owner of the provided Discord Token. Injecting another user's Token into the system without consent is an illegal act, and AutoQuest refuses any sponsorship of dispute risks.

3. Frequency and Traffic Limits

To ensure fair operation for the entire server fleet, we apply Rate Limits. Any attempt to deliberately DDoS the processing system, spam commands, or obstruct API connections against the Discord ecosystem will result in being permanently blacklisted from the service.

4. Right to Suspend Service

We are a Non-Profit Open Source platform; therefore, the core authors reserve the full right to terminate or suspend the entire routing system or database services at any time for maintenance without prior notice.
